leadText: Galvanize (Japanese: エレキスキン Electric Skin) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Alolan Geodude's evolutionary line.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation VII 1.1.2 Affected moves 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation VII [ edit | edit source ] Galvanize causes all Normal-type moves used by the Pokémon to become Electric-type and receive a 20% power boost. Normal-type moves that become Electric-type in this manner can activate Lightning Rod , Volt Absorb , and Motor Drive . If a move is affected by Galvanize and is used under Electric Terrain , it will receive an additional 30% power boost from Electric Terrain (50% prior to Generation VIII ). Affected moves [ edit | edit source ] The table below lists the moves affected by Galvanize, as well as the Pokémon that can have Galvanize and learn those moves. Move Type Cat. Power and Boost Learned by Body Slam Normal Physical 85 102 Double-Edge Normal Physical 120 144 Echoed Voice Normal Special 40 48 Explosion Normal Physical 250 300 Facade Normal Physical 70 84 Flail Normal Physical — — Frustration Normal Physical — — Giga Impact Normal Physical 150 180 Hyper Beam Normal Special 150 180 Return Normal Physical — — Rock Climb Normal Physical 90 108 Round Normal Special 60 72 Self-Destruct Normal Physical 200 240 Snore Normal Special 50 60 Tackle Normal Physical 40 48 Take Down Normal Physical 90 108 Tera Blast Normal Special 80 96 Although the following moves are affected by the Ability, they currently cannot be learned by any Pokémon with Galvanize. They may, however, be called via Metronome , Mirror Move , Copycat , or Mimic , or be used by a Pokémon that gained Galvanize by an Ability like Trace or Receiver or a move such as Skill Swap or Role Play .
